title: Recurring Cost Calculator (RCA)
description: Industrial-grade recurring cost analysis tool based on Lean, Six Sigma, and ISO 14000 standards. Calculates total recurring cost, identifies hidden loss drivers, and suggests improvement actions.

inputs.label: Labor Rate (per hour)
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly wage including burden for direct labor operators.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average hourly wage including burden for direct labor operators.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Cycle
inputs.businessContext: Standard time per production cycle (e.g., per unit or batch).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard time per production cycle (e.g., per unit or batch).

inputs.label: Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per unit of output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct material cost per unit of output.

inputs.label: Energy Cost per Cycle
inputs.businessContext: Electricity, gas, or other energy costs per production cycle.

businessContext_i18n.en: Electricity, gas, or other energy costs per production cycle.

inputs.label: Maintenance Cost per Cycle
inputs.businessContext: Average preventive and corrective maintenance cost allocated per cycle.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average preventive and corrective maintenance cost allocated per cycle.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage applied to direct costs to cover indirect expenses (ISO 14051).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage applied to direct costs to cover indirect expenses (ISO 14051).

inputs.label: Cycle Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Actual cycle time per unit; used for throughput and efficiency calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual cycle time per unit; used for throughput and efficiency calculations.

inputs.label: Defect Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units that fail quality inspection (Six Sigma metric).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of units that fail quality inspection (Six Sigma metric).

inputs.label: Rework Cost per Defect
inputs.businessContext: Additional cost to rework or scrap a defective unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional cost to rework or scrap a defective unit.

inputs.label: Production Volume (units/month)
inputs.businessContext: Monthly production quantity used to scale recurring costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly production quantity used to scale recurring costs.

inputs.label: Shift Pattern
inputs.businessContext: Determines labor multiplier and overhead allocation (Lean standard).

businessContext_i18n.en: Determines labor multiplier and overhead allocation (Lean standard).

inputs.label: Include Environmental Cost (ISO 14000)
inputs.businessContext: If true, adds estimated environmental compliance and waste disposal costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, adds estimated environmental compliance and waste disposal costs.

rules.message: Cycle time and labor hours must be positive.
Defect rate must be between 0% and 100%.
Shift pattern must be one of: single, double, continuous.

thresholds.message: Labor cost per cycle exceeds $50. Consider process improvement (Lean).
Defect rate above 5% — Six Sigma DMAIC project recommended.
Energy cost per cycle > $10. Investigate energy efficiency (ISO 50001).
Overhead rate > 50%. Review indirect cost drivers (ABC analysis).

formulas.label: Direct Labor Cost per Unit
formulas.description: Labor cost incurred per unit produced.

formulas.label: Quality Cost per Unit
formulas.description: Expected rework/scrap cost per unit due to defects.

formulas.label: Environmental Cost per Unit (if included)
formulas.description: Estimated environmental compliance and waste disposal cost per unit (5% of material+energy).

formulas.label: Shift Multiplier
formulas.expression: CASE shift_pattern WHEN 'single' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'double' THEN 1.5 WHEN 'continuous' THEN 2.0 ELSE 1.0 END
formulas.description: Multiplier to account for shift-related overhead and labor premiums.

formulas.label: Total Direct Cost per Unit
formulas.expression: direct_labor_cost_per_unit + material_cost_per_unit + energy_cost_per_cycle + maintenance_cost_per_cycle + quality_cost_per_unit + environmental_cost_per_unit
formulas.description: Sum of all direct costs per unit.

formulas.label: Overhead Cost per Unit
formulas.description: Allocated overhead per unit based on direct costs and shift pattern.

formulas.label: Total Recurring Cost per Unit (Primary Result)
formulas.description: Primary result: fully loaded recurring cost per unit.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Defect & Rework Loss
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Costs due to defects and rework, often hidden in standard accounting.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Energy Inefficiency Loss
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Excess energy cost compared to benchmark (ISO 50001).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Overhead Allocation Distortion
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Potential misallocation of overhead due to shift pattern and indirect costs.

suggestedActions.label: Implement Six Sigma DMAIC to reduce defect rate below 2%.
suggestedActions.impact: Reduces quality cost per unit and hidden loss.

suggestedActions.label: Conduct energy audit (ISO 50001) to identify savings opportunities.
suggestedActions.impact: Lowers energy cost per cycle and environmental cost.

suggestedActions.label: Apply Lean Kaizen to reduce cycle time and labor hours.
suggestedActions.impact: Decreases direct labor cost and improves throughput.

suggestedActions.label: Review overhead allocation using Activity-Based Costing (ABC).
suggestedActions.impact: Ensures accurate cost assignment and identifies waste.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Cost
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Total recurring cost adjusted by a confidence factor (0.8 to 1.2) based on input variability.
